## Checklist

- [ ] `go test ./...` passes locally
- [ ] New or updated tests cover the change (if applicable)
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](../CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-format): `type(scope): subject`
- [ ] README / docs updated if behaviour changed
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or credentials in the diff
